prompt_improvements.improvement: Explicitly require placeholder (non-production) values in local.settings.json.example for all required env vars and add tests asserting placeholder format.
prompt_improvements.rationale: Prevents accidental hardcoded environment values and ensures acceptance criteria are verifiable.

prompt_improvements.improvement: Instruct the implementor to map each acceptance criterion to at least one automated test assertion.
prompt_improvements.rationale: Improves reviewability and reduces missed criteria.

prompt_improvements.improvement: Instruct the implementor to avoid tests that require importing modules with unresolved project dependencies in fresh clones; prefer source-text or config-file assertions when needed.
prompt_improvements.rationale: Keeps tests stable in minimal repository states.
